dc:title: Open Mind Corpus (2017-2026)
dc:creator: Lakens, Daniel
dc:subject: cognitive science
open access
natural language processing
AI validation
text mining
dc:description: A complete corpus of 293 articles published in Open Mind between 2017 and 2026, converted to metacheck paperlist objects for validation of AI and text-mining tools. Open Mind is a fully open-access MIT Press journal.

dc:provenance.doi_source: CrossRef REST API, ISSN 2470-2986 (complete corpus, no sampling)
dc:provenance.sampling: none -- all 295 CrossRef-registered journal-article records, 293 retained after excluding 1 non-article notice and 1 oversized PDF
dc:provenance.pdf_source: Unpaywall best_oa_location (direct.mit.edu, with Sec-CH-UA Client Hints headers and retry-with-backoff to mitigate a probabilistic Cloudflare check), Europe PMC for a subset, 1 article recovered via landing-page PDF-link scrape
dc:provenance.doi_matching: Verified against CrossRef DOI used for sampling (2026-06-21)
dc:provenance.quality_audit: 1 non-article notice (bare 'Erratum' title) dropped, 3 garbled DOIs corrected, 1 oversized PDF excluded, 0 duplicates, 0 thin-content papers
